name: lastsaas
description: Read-only admin MCP server for LastSaaS — 26 tools for monitoring dashboards, users, tenants, financials, logs, health, and system configuration.
long_description: LastSaaS is a complete, open-source SaaS platform foundation with multi-tenant auth, Stripe billing, white-label branding, API keys, webhooks, and a full admin interface. The MCP server provides read-only access to all admin data: query dashboards, search users and tenants, analyze financial metrics (revenue, ARR, DAU, MAU), search system logs, monitor health across nodes, audit API keys and webhooks, and inspect plans and configuration — all authenticated via a root-tenant API key over the LastSaaS HTTP API.

tools.name: get_about
tools.description: Get system version and environment info

tools.name: dashboard_stats
tools.description: Get admin dashboard summary with user/tenant counts and health status

tools.name: list_tenants
tools.description: List tenants with pagination, search, and filtering

tools.name: get_tenant
tools.description: Get detailed tenant info including plan, billing, credits, and members

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List users with pagination, search, and status filtering

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get detailed user info with auth methods, MFA status, and memberships

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List financial transactions with pagination and filtering

tools.name: get_financial_metrics
tools.description: Get time-series financial metrics (revenue, ARR, DAU, MAU)

tools.name: search_logs
tools.description: Search system logs with severity, category, and date filters

tools.name: get_log_severity_counts
tools.description: Get log counts grouped by severity level

tools.name: get_system_health
tools.description: Get current CPU, memory, disk, HTTP, and MongoDB stats

tools.name: get_health_metrics
tools.description: Get time-series health data for charting

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description: List server nodes with status and version info

tools.name: get_integrations
tools.description: Get third-party integration health status

tools.name: list_config
tools.description: List all runtime configuration variables

tools.name: get_config
tools.description: Get a single configuration variable by name

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List subscription plans with pricing and entitlements

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Get detailed plan info with pricing, seats, and entitlements

tools.name: list_entitlement_keys
tools.description: List all entitlement keys with types and descriptions

tools.name: list_credit_bundles
tools.description: List credit bundles with pricing and status

tools.name: list_announcements
tools.description: List published and draft announcements

tools.name: list_promotions
tools.description: List Stripe promotion codes with coupon details

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: List API keys with metadata (previews only, full keys never exposed)

tools.name: list_root_members
tools.description: List admin team members and pending invitations

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List outbound webhook configurations

tools.name: list_webhook_event_types
tools.description: List available webhook event types by category

tools.name: get_webhook
tools.description: Get webhook detail with delivery history

server_url.title: LastSaaS Server URL
server_url.description: The URL of your LastSaaS instance (e.g., https://your-app.fly.dev or http://localhost:4290)

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Root-tenant API key with admin authority. Create one in Admin → API Keys.
